schedules.title: Memory curation
schedules.prompt: Curate recent archived chats, memory proposals, and durable learnings. Use the memory agent. Prefer existing session-insights sections, update the configured vault, and report only processed counts plus changed files.

schedules.title: Skill evolution
schedules.prompt: Run the skill-evolution maintenance pipeline with the configured model. Surface generated proposals and any failed gates. Do not apply proposals automatically.

schedules.title: Dependency review
schedules.prompt: Run the dependency review pipeline and report new releases, deprecations, and concrete follow-up actions. If the command fails, report the failure instead of claiming no changes.

schedules.title: Weekly self-improvement review
schedules.prompt: Run the weekly self-improvement checklist from the packaged weekly-review-template.md asset. Apply concrete low-risk local fixes and report anything that needs user approval.
